name: Rhubarb and Banana Fool
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and pure the rhubarb, then allow it to cool.
2. Mix together the sugar, ginger, and most of the banana slices. Combine well.
3. Gradually beat the mixture into the quark until smooth.
4. Fold in the egg whites until just combined.
5. Spoon the mixture into individual serving dishes.
6. Chill thoroughly before serving.
7. Top with the remaining banana slices and serve.
